privileged_info_summary: The Muncie project is a standard HEC-RAS example dataset. The initial main channel Manning's n-value for the first cross-section in Muncie.x04 is 0.04. The relevant line originally reads "       0     .07  250.23     .04  401.13     .07", where .04 is the middle roughness coefficient (main channel) and .07 are the left and right overbanks. The correct action is to change the .04 to 0.05 on this specific line.
